title: CubesideMod
description: Mod with extra functions for Cubeside.de
body:
# Mod functions
All functions, can be turned off in the settings.

## Screens
### Start Screen
On the start screen is a direct join button with which you can join directly to the server.

### Pause Screen
In the Pause screen there is a button for the settings of the mod

## Generic
### ThirdPersonElytra
Automatic third person view when starting with the Eyltra. After landing, the previous view is automatically switched. 

### ElytraAlarm
If you fly below the minimum altitude, a warning tone is played.

### ShowInvisibleArmorstands
When you have an armor stand in your hand, invisible armor stands appear, just like in spectator mode. (On some servers this might be considered a cheat).

### AFKPling
Plays a hint tone when you are set to AFK by the server. (this only works on Cubeside)

### ClickableTPAMessage
Teleport requests can be clicked. (This only works with EssentialsX in German)

### TPASound
Sound when you get a Teleport requests (This only works with EssentialsX in German)

### GamemodeSwitcher
Allows the use of the GameModeSwitcher (The Gamemode Switcher only executes commands, which means that you can only switch the gamemode if you have the necessary rights).

### ActionBarShadow
Messages in the ActionBar have no shadow.

## Chat
### ChatTimeStamps
Displays a time stamp before all messages in the chat.

### TimeStampColor
Color from Chat Time Stamp

### SaveMessagesToDatabase
Saves all messages to a local database and reloads them when you enter a server. Only the messages from the server you are joined to will be loaded.

### DaysTheMessagesAreStored
Time in days how long the messages are stored in the database.

### ChatMessageLimit
Bypasses the limit in chat on how far up mach can scroll. (Default: 100 Max: 2147483647)

## Chunk Loading
### FullVerticalView
Allows to look from top to bottom of a world at low ViewDistance.

### UnloadChunks
Prevents chunks from being discharged. This allows you to continue watching when you have loaded the chunks.
 
### FakeViewDistance
Here you can set how far the loaded chunks are displayed.

## Fun Stuff
### DropItemFancy
Items are just lying on the floor.

### DisableChristmasChest
Deactivates the Christmaschests at Christmas (Requires a restart of the game after the change)

## HitBox
### RainbowEntityHitBox
HitBox of entities have a color gradient.

### RainbowEntityHitBoxColorList
List of colors for the gradient.

### RainbowEntityHitBoxSpeed
Speed of the gradient

### EntityHitBoxVisibility
Visibility of the hitbox

### EntityHitBoxDirection
HitBox Show viewing direction and eye level.

### RainbowBlockHitBox
HitBox of blocks have a color gradient.

### RainbowBlockHitBoxColorList
List of colors for the gradient.

### RainbowBlockHitBoxSpeed
Speed of the gradient

### BlockHitBoxVisibility
Visibility of the hitbox

## Fixes
### SimpleSignGlow
Removes the shadow from GlowSigns. (The font is normal but glows in the dark).

## Permission Setting
Only interesting for Cubeside team members

## Other functions
### Zoom like Optifine.
You can set a key in the controls (Key binds) with which you can zoom.
